name: python3-isc-dhcp-leases
title: python3-isc-dhcp-leases
summary: Python module for reading dhcp leases files (Python 3 interface)
description:
Python module for reading dhcp leases files (Python 3 interface)
This is a small Python module for reading /var/lib/dhcp/dhcpd.leases as written
by isc-dhcp-server.
It also supports reading lease files from the isc dhcp daemon running
in IPv6 mode.
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-isc-dhcp-leases because Python module for reading dhcp leases files (Python 3 interface).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-isc-dhcp-leases as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-isc-dhcp-leases with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-isc-dhcp-leases --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
